problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
